title: Cobblemon ShldrFx
description:
Its a customizable Cobblemon ShoulderEffects datapack.

originally made for CobbleChaos server
body:
# "CobbleChaosShldrFX" - Cobblemon shoulder effects datapack

CobbleChaosShldrFX is fully open source.
Feel free, customize, and redistribute.
Credit is appreciated, but not required.

## What this datapack does

- Adds a `"shoulderMountable"` property to the Pokémon’s data.
- Adds an `"Effect"` that gets removed when the pokemon dismounts.
- Functions added to "handle" the permanent effect bug.

## Installation

  1. Place the .zip in your datapacks folder.
  2. Start your world/server.
  3. Put a Pokémon with the desired effect on your shoulder.
  4. Profit.

 ---
 
## Minecraft 1.21+ datapack PSA 
The folder for mcfunction files is now `function/` (singular), not `functions/` (plural).
If your functions aren’t running, check your folder names!
